name: @metorial/coinbase
description: Buy, sell, send, and receive cryptocurrency. Manage wallets and accounts, create market/limit/stop-limit orders, and view transaction history. Access real-time and historical market data including prices, exchange rates, and order books. Accept crypto payments via Coinbase Commerce by creating charges and checkouts. Query onchain data such as balances and transaction history across supported networks. Stream live market data via WebSocket. Receive webhooks for account events, payment lifecycle changes, and onchain activity.
